sql.i: select student_id, student_no, student_name, class_id, gender, status, remark, create_time, update_time from student_info where 1=1 <if test="studentName != null and studentName != ''"> and student_name like concat('%',{studentName},'%') </if> <if test="studentNo != null and studentNo != ''"> and student_no like concat('%',{studentNo},'%') </if> <if test="classId != null and classId != ''"> and class_id = {classId} </if> <if test="gender != null"> and gender = {gender} </if> <if test="status != null"> and status = {status} </if> order by create_time desc limit {pageSize} offset {startIndex}

select count(1) from student_info where 1=1 <if test="studentName != null and studentName != ''"> and student_name like concat('%',{studentName},'%') </if> <if test="studentNo != null and studentNo != ''"> and student_no like concat('%',{studentNo},'%') </if> <if test="classId != null and classId != ''"> and class_id = {classId} </if> <if test="gender != null"> and gender = {gender} </if> <if test="status != null"> and status = {status} </if>
select count(1) from student_info where student_no = {studentNo}
select count(1) from student_info where student_no = {studentNo} and student_id != {studentId}

insert into student_info (student_id, student_no, student_name, class_id, gender, status, remark, create_time, update_time) values ({studentId}, {studentNo}, {studentName}, {classId}, {gender}, {status}, {remark}, now(), now())

update student_info set student_no = {studentNo}, student_name = {studentName}, class_id = {classId}, gender = {gender}, status = {status}, remark = {remark}, update_time = now() where student_id = {studentId}
delete from student_info where student_id in ({studentIds})

update student_info set <if test="classId != null and classId != ''"> class_id = {classId}, </if> <if test="status != null"> status = {status}, </if> update_time = now() where student_id in ({studentIds})

select student_id, student_no, student_name, class_id, gender, status, remark, create_time, update_time from student_info where 1=1 <if test="studentName != null and studentName != ''"> and student_name like concat('%',{studentName},'%') </if> <if test="studentNo != null and studentNo != ''"> and student_no like concat('%',{studentNo},'%') </if> <if test="classId != null and classId != ''"> and class_id = {classId} </if> <if test="gender != null"> and gender = {gender} </if> <if test="status != null"> and status = {status} </if> order by create_time desc
select class_id, class_name from class_info order by class_name
